title: Onboarding - Organized - Allow "Poly Lens" to use your location window [Android]
scenario: Verify location permission prompt appears correctly on the Organized screen when tapping "Enable now", with proper text and options while the background remains on the Organized page.
steps: 3. Observe the location permission prompt that appears.
expected: The location permission prompt displays the text "Allow Poly Lens to use your location" with options "Allow Once" (or "Only This Time" on Android), "Allow while using app", and "Don't allow". The background remains on the Organized page.
